title: Fused masked_whiten kernel
summary: Create a fused kernel for masked_whiten that computes mean + variance + whitened output in fewer passes using Welford-style accumulation.

benchmark.command: python scripts/benchmark_whitened.py (if exists) or manual timing

success_gate: Kernel produces same results as original two-pass implementation with reduced passes.

results.approach: Two-kernel approach: accumulate statistics then apply whitening
